reviews.review_description:
Club room is a fun relaxing game I spent  multiple hours, playing playing club room building my apartments having fun and meeting new people visiting varieties of businesses within club room once you play club room on your VR headset, it's hard to pull away. Because you have multiple things you can do. And you can be very creative
If you don't believe me just go ahead I'll be on there
It's a five star for me

I’m just learning about this and it’s very nice. The creator is very helpful and explains everything thoroughly. It’s easy to navigate and fun! Hey don’t take my word for it 🤷🏽‍♀️, download the app and join the fun. Great job to the creator!

reviews.review_title: I absolutelyI absolutely love club rooms
reviews.review_description:
As a founder of New Horizon Movie Company, I'm always looking for platforms that make it easy to connect collaborate and bill communities club room has become one of my favorite places to do exactly that

The atmosphere is welcoming the people are engaging. The platform offers a unique space where meaningful conversation, networking, creativity and community can thrive. I've had the opportunity to meet amazing people attend, interesting discussions and even create spaces that support my business and my creative projects.

What I appreciate most is the sense of connection. Clubroom feels like a place where people can come together. Share ideas support one another and build genuine relationships.

And not to mention, the creators of this app is even more amazing and very supportive to everyone that come to clubroom the creators are very kind people 
The team continues to improve the platform and it's exciting to be a part of a growing community with so much potential. I look forward to seeing where club room goes in the future and how it continues to evolve.

The more I visit this place I find myself liking it more. The only downside for me is moving around. For some reason I can’t just glide through I get this red line that comes from my right hand and I can’t get rid of it, which causes me to get motion sickness 😢

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review! We're glad to hear you're enjoying CLUB ROOM more with each visit.

Regarding the red beam, this is not expected CLUB ROOM behavior. As we discussed previously, the issue appears to be related to your controller rather than the app itself. A red teleport beam indicates a non-valid teleport target and should not remain continuously active during normal operation.

We appreciate the feedback and hope to see you again in CLUB ROOM.

reviews.review_description: I just started 2day a go, on this app and I love ❤️ it, this reminds me of  altspace but  Different than altspace It's in a Class of its own, You should come on and enjoy the app you will have so much fun and you'll be spending so much time in  here,   that you will be like Wow were did the time go, because you're busy fixing up your apartment riding the train, but Hey just come in and check it out for yourself .

For an app that has only been around less than a year, it has features that I can use for teaching my classes. The developers are very talented and approachable. Looking forward to seeing the continual growth in the app.

reviews.review_title: Great way to meet people and socialize.
reviews.review_description: I truly enjoy being on this app. Great Job to the Developers who are Constantly making it better and more fun creating for us. Continue doing  the Great Job. BTW THIS APP IS FOR 17 AND UP. PLEASE ABIDE BY THEIR RULES.

The Developers really went above and beyond. This is the best entertainment and engaging app I have experienced! Just when you thought you seen it all, something else to smile about. Very pleasant people and respectful.
So I'm new to this world. And Im learning how to build for the first time. But how do I get the pictures I took from my apartment? Can someone pls answer me.

developer_response.body:
Hello Mrs.Rodriguez82,

Thank you for the 5-star review and welcome to CLUB ROOM! We're glad to hear you're enjoying learning how to build and decorate your space.

Please feel free to find Stem or Rolin in-app and we'll be happy to answer any questions you have.

We hope you continue enjoying CLUB ROOM!

reviews.review_description: Been using only a few days, and it's being updated all the time, crisp clear graphics great sound,  YouTube player, and full web browser can be added, decorate your apartment your way with hundreds of things to choose from,  with more added regularly, travel with friends on the tube, do a bit of vertual shopping,  and soon be able to hang out in a bar, soon to come.
I really enjoyed the game and the Devs are super nice

I got to meet one of the Dev and i dont know how to turn the furniture but you can make new friends hangout and over all one of the best games in my opinion even though this game was made by two people great

reviews.review_title: Having a great time in this app!
reviews.review_description: Discovered Club Room a few days ago. Having so much fun decorating my space and hanging out with friends. Devs are in game a lot, very friendly and helpful.
Mods moderate they are on point! Cigars in the whisky bar are  best! I highly recommend… f
This is so much fun the owners are so nice I love meeting new people exploring riding the train keep up the good work

You can make and build , decorate your own room. And visit your friends rooms , hang out in the lobby or bar. 

Developers are always adding new features.
I’m sorry
I am an interior design enthusiast so the fact that I can decorate my apartment the way I want to is definitely a plus!  Very nice people in the building as well. Definitely recommend this app!
this game is good i like it

reviews.review_title: ABSOLUTELY  A MUST TRY AND STAY
reviews.review_description:
This APP HAS SO MUCH TO OFFER 
 I LOVE IT , IT FEELS  LIKE HOME AWAY FROM HOME GOOD VIBES CHILL, AWESOME APP OWNERS TO COMMUNICATE WITH,THIS IS A AWESOME EXPERIENCE

When  I spawned into this app for the first time  I felt at home. I got to meet the 2 developers and some awesome people, the developers gave me a tour and shared with me there plans for the app. Now although they’ve made it clear that they are not trying to copy Altspace or any other app out there, it’s totally giving Altspace vibes…… But hey don’t take my word for it, download the app and check it out for yourself, and be sure to connect with the 2 awesome people running this amazing app Rolin & Stem.
best game ever
I played with the dev and they had a new game! Sadly my vr died but I'm definitely gonna join tomorrow and play their new game!

reviews.review_title: CLUB ROOM IS FUN AND VERY CREATIVE.
reviews.review_description: Love playing  it, plus making new friends.

What an absolute amazing place to be over in the Club Room meeting amazing people, it's a totally relaxing and fond existence to be in and I cannot thank the developers enough for creating such a wonderful environment for us to go. Thankyou so much dudes, Party On!!. Xx

i love it you can hang out customize your apartment(s) the community is so cool and nice and there's nothing really like it . My personal favorite game. I know and respect the Devs too, just be respectful 😄 -EZ
You can meet up with the owner in game great community devs are super nice awesome game and awesome devs

CLUB ROOM is your go-to VR hangout spot! Dive in, make new friends, and put your own spin on your space. You start with 300 coins and can earn even more as you go, unlocking awesome environments and features. Explore not just your private apartment and the lively public lobby, but also take a stroll around the city outside. With constant updates, there’s always something new and exciting to discover. It’s all about fun, connection, and creativity!
I stumbled across this app a few weeks ago and I got to say it’s very good. There seems to be new updates and improvements every time I enter it. Create your own space… awesome.
This reminds me so much of altspace, but in early development. I love everything about this app and the DEVS are awesome sauce!!! Keep up the good work!

Club Room VR is a warm,authentic connections in a space that feels like home. The Dev's Stem & Rolin, are legends: approachable, visionary, and always tuning in to our vibes. PERSONALIZE your own apartment with killer furniture,  snap selfie with endless avatar flair, and teleport to friends via the genius phone tool. It's not just an app; it's where legends legends reunite foe endless hangs. 5 stars-DOWNLOAD  now and join the glow up
Love the app! Keep finding myself returning.  Definitely looking forward to more developments.

Absolutely love everything about Club Room! The standout for me is building your own apartment—there’s a huge variety of furnishings and customization options that make it feel truly personal. Whether you’re decorating solo or showing off your space to friends, it’s endlessly fun and expressive. Plus, the developers are incredibly helpful and responsive, which makes the whole experience even better. A perfect blend of creativity, community, and cozy vibes.

I spawned into the app and was immediately greeted by Rolin and Stem the two developers. They gave me a warm welcome and a tour of the features of the app also shared with me their goals for building and creating more content. As I was a creative world builder and designer from Altspace, I can see some of the similarities to Altspace, but not exact in many ways. Download the app, it's free, and they give you a free apartment to design yourself, along with 300 coins to get furniture and stuff. Nice to feel the familiarity of designing your own home space. Finally, it was nice to see friends from Altspace designing and creating spaces to call home.
Instantly hooked, this game has so much to offer, so supprised , my advice, everyone needs to come check it out, very welcoming, well managed and great community 😜😜😜
I play with my grandma and watch youtube!! Spy Agent 🕵️‍♂️

reviews.review_title: The sun has risen, CLUB ROOM!
reviews.review_description:
Sunset, March 10th 2023. 
For many of us who enjoy our time within our headsets being social and hanging out with friends, this was a sad day!
The realization that the sun had set on an era and it  was all coming to an end had us all scrambling for a new place to land. The options were few. The effort was made, but none hit the mark until now!

While this app is still within its infancy, the Mark has been hit! This is the app we have all been waiting and looking for!
The ability to create our own personalized spaces and hang out once again with our legless friends is back!

There are so many amazing things on the horizon for CLUB ROOM. I am so excited to be on the ground floor looking up at what is to come!

I thank the Developers for their time. Wisdom and patience. They are always around to ensure the experience is great and to answer any questions you may have!

Thanks again! If you're looking for me I'll be in the lobby shopping.. or somewhere making one of my spaces fabulous!
Great app for hanging out with friends and making new ones. Decorate your own apartment and invite your friends!  Amazing Developers are always around if you need help.

I was a bit lost at first, unsure how to friend people or decorate. A lovely person in the lobby chatted with me then showed me how to use my phone to connect, and then joined me in my apartment to walk me through the tablet. They showed me how to pull up my inventory and place furniture, which completely opened up the experience for me.

That kind of helpful, patient interaction seems to be the norm here. It’s a warm, civil environment for conversation, which can be hard to find. The developers have created something special—a platform that genuinely encourages connection. It feels both promising and well-considered.

I started playing this 3 or 4 days after opening. This is a great game. Easy, easy going atmosphere, fun. The developers are on site a lot of hours a day. Very helpful. Love this game. Can't wait to see where it goes.

Five stars for the amount of stuff you can do. The cell phone is genius—You can use it to see where your friends are and teleport to them. My favorite thing is probably buying new furniture and configuring my own space. It just needs more hat options for selfies! Seriously though, great app.
I loaded it, glitched out, came back and wandered an empty room as a very short (no sit/stand height options).  Maybe I will try again someday. Cheers

developer_response.body:
Hi SpookyCanuck, thank you for trying CLUB ROOM and for the feedback. We're sorry to hear your first session felt 'too early' due to the glitch and confusion.

The empty room is your personal apartment starter space. We give everyone 300 free coins to visit the Lobby and buy furniture to decorate it exactly how you like! For the height issue, you can adjust your view at any time using the A (up) and B (down) buttons on your right controller.

Our app is built to run smoothly at a high frame rate, so what you experienced is not the norm. We hope you'll give it another try with these tips in mind—we're confident you'll have a much better experience.

reviews.review_description: This is just the beginning for Club Room. A great place to hang out, watch youtube and chill, or set up your own place however you like.
A great place to hang out and relax.  With future games coming soon,  see you in club room 👍😎👋
I’ve been enjoying it a lot. The devs are really great and care about it.
I really love CLUB ROOM it is very very very amazing and awesome
So cool
